title: Yume 4
description: A modpack for a little more of a challenge, with much to discover and technology to explore.
body:
# Yume 4 
_______________________________________________________________________________________________
A modpack for a little more of a challenge, with automation such as "Create" and "Applied Energistics"; ranging from steampunk to more furturistic. There is an overloading amount of mobs, from friendly pokémon to evil giant crabs.


<details>
<summary>Features</summary>
  
-Relics and Artifacts to boot your power

-Security to protect your rubbish

-Cars, Planes and Trains

-Cool Terrain for sight seeing

-10+ Dimensions

-Vampires (don't get bit)

-Dungeons (there really cool)

-Currency to sell to others (oh, all alone?)

-More Blocks, chairs and stuff to build cool house

-Very cool kamera

-Food to shove your face with

-Sleeping bag

-Pokémon badges and case
### Diffficult Stuff

-Seasons (Save for winter)

-Need to consume food and water

-temperature (you gonna die)

-Each eye for the end portal is different, to open it
### Bonus
-Shaders

-Map (with land claims)

-Zoom (your blind)

-Jade (tells you what it is, when looking at it)

-EMI (shows crafting recipes)

-AppleSkin (show how much food give you without eating)

Note: This isn't exactly everthing.
</details>

________________________
### Check out the mod creators to show your support.
